name: culvert-ai-ulster
description: Ulster County culvert prediction workflow and field review dashboard.

scripts.demo: scripts/python.sh -m culvert_ai.cli run-demo --output-dir data/ulster_demo && scripts/python.sh -m culvert_ai.cli export-web --predictions data/ulster_demo/processed/unlabeled_predictions.gpkg --output-dir web/data
scripts.import:reports: scripts/python.sh -m culvert_ai.cli import-field-reports --input "/Users/Carli/Downloads/Team No. 2-selected (1)" --output data/processed/field_report_culverts.gpkg --csv-output data/processed/field_report_culverts.csv
scripts.retrain:from-vercel: npm run pull:observations && npm run predict:actual && npm run build
